description: Out-of-scope (bipolar-spectrum, edge-with-anxiety): description points clearly to bipolar-spectrum territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'bipolar-spectrum'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: I'm anxious most of the time, like there's this constant hum of worry. But also there are these weeks where I just feel UP — I clean the whole house at three in the morning, I write thousand-word emails to people I haven't talked to in years, I feel invincible and brilliant. Then I crash hard and can't function for weeks.
